features.title: CV tools & privacy
features.cvReviewDesc: Adds a "Review my CV" button with actionable suggestions.

features.privacyModeDesc: Removes name, email, phone and address from the CV before it's sent to the AI. On by default.

jobSearch.reviewEmpty: Your scan parameters will appear here as you fill Step 2.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Job Finder
onboarding.intro: Three quick steps to get going:
onboarding.step1Hint: Groq is free and easy to start with.
onboarding.step2Hint: PDF or DOCX — used by AI to score listings.
onboarding.subtitle: Two quick steps and you're ready to scan jobs.
onboarding.hint: You can explore the rest of the app freely while completing these.

banner.noKey: No AI provider configured — chat uses rule-based replies.
banner.signupHint: Need a key? Both options are free, no credit card.
banner.warningTitle: Configure an AI provider key to start using Job Finder
banner.warningHint: Free options below — sign up takes a minute.

info.title: How Job
info.subtitle: A short tour of every feature so you can get the most out of the app.

what.title: What is Job Finder?
what.body: Job Finder is a local AI-powered job search assistant. It reads your CV, scans LinkedIn and Indeed, scores listings against your profile, and helps you write targeted cover letters and prepare interviews.

start.title: Getting started
start.step1: Upload your CV in the Profile tab — Job Finder extracts your skills, experience and target roles.
start.step2: Configure at least one AI provider key in Settings (Groq is free and easy to start).
start.step3: Open Job Search, pick filters and keywords, then launch the scan.
start.step4: Review results in the Dashboard and chat with the AI Coach about specific jobs.

providers.title: AI providers
providers.groq: Free, fast, generous limits. Great default.
providers.openrouter: Access many models including free tiers.

scan.title: Scanning & filters
scan.body: In Job Search you can pick experience level (internship → senior), contract type (full-time, part-time, internship, contract, temporary) and work mode (remote, hybrid, on-site). The scan shows live progress with percentage and estimated time remaining.

chat.title: Chat with the AI Coach
chat.multi: Multiple chats: use the dropdown next to the coach to switch between separate conversations, or start a new one.
chat.pin: Pin jobs to a chat: open a job's details and click "Pin to chat" to give the coach the full description, then ask questions like "compare these two".
chat.cover: Cover letter: from a job's detail panel you can generate a cover letter targeted at the recruiter when their info is visible on LinkedIn.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: All your data (CV, jobs, chats, keys) is stored locally in a SQLite database under your user folder. Nothing is uploaded except your prompts to the AI provider you choose.

tutorial.step1Body: Open Settings and paste an API key — Groq is free and works out of the box.
tutorial.step2Body: Open the Profile tab and upload a PDF or DOCX. The AI will extract your skills, roles and experience.
tutorial.step3Body: In Job Search, pick filters and keywords, then start the scan. You'll see live progress and AI-scored results.

errors.noProviderToast: Configure an AI provider key first

skillGap.title: Skill Gap
skillGap.subtitle: Skills most often missing across your scored jobs — learn these to unlock more matches.
skillGap.empty: Scan and score some jobs to see your skill gaps.

quit.closed: Job Finder is closed. You can close this tab.
